title: Savory Mediterranean Curry Powder Crumble
description: A quick-fix keto-friendly mediterranean dish featuring savory curry powder and a velvety texture for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup unsweetened almond milk or cream
ingredients.notes: Can substitute with Greek yogurt for a dairy-free option

ingredients.name: 8 ounces ground turkey or chicken, cooked and crumbled
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with beef if preferred

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the almond milk (or yogurt), olive oil, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Add the ground meat to the mixture and mix well until thoroughly combined.
Fold in the grated Parmesan cheese if using.
Transfer the crumble mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 12-15 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden and the top is slightly crispy.
